name: agent-org
description: AI organizational engineering toolkit. Phase 4 までで context-compressor / decision-keeper / architect-reviewer / regression-watcher / regression-fixer subagent、/compress-context / /org-init / /run-review / /start-watcher / /fix-regression command、consulting-memory / recording-decision / running-review skill、PostCompact / Stop / TaskCompleted / PostToolUse(Bash) hooks を提供。worktree 隔離下では fixer が git remote 経由 (push + gh pr) で main に統合する設計。v0.6.0: beads (Phase 5) hard dependency — detection/fix を beads (Steve Yegge graph issue tracker) に格納、`bd update --claim` で atomic claim、`bd dep add` で依存グラフ。bd 未 install / `.beads/` 未初期化なら subagent は immediate error で abort。v0.7.0: Phase 6 approval を bd issue 化 — `.claude/agent-org/approvals/<task-id>.json` を廃止し `bd create -t approval` + label + priority で表現。task-completed-gate / stop-quality-gate を bd label-based query に書換、再 review は `bd dep add --type supersedes`。/migrate-approvals-to-beads で旧 approval JSON を変換。v0.7.1: bd 1.0.4 実機検証で `types.custom` が正解と判明 (U13 PoC 結論誤り)。v0.8.0: BREAKING — ADR-007 採用で bd 物理配置を `~/.beads/<proj-hash>/.beads/` → `<repo>/.beads/` (repo-local、git worktree-aware) に変更、`bd init --stealth --skip-agents` で `.git/info/exclude` 経由の個人 git exclude を採用 (`.gitignore` 編集不要、collaborators 不可視)、BEADS_DIR 明示指定を廃止。/migrate-beads-to-repo-local で v0.7.x → v0.8.0 移行 (bd export → init --stealth → bd import で issue 完全保持)。v1.0.0 で機能セット凍結予定
